pages.title: Home
pages.content:
I am Cédric Girerd, a Postdoctoral Researcher in Medical Robotics at the University of California San Diego. I work in Morimoto Lab, which is part of the Contextual Robotics Institute.

See Résumé for more


Latest Publications


C. Girerd, A. V. Kudryavtsev, P. Rougeot, P. Renaud, K. Rabenorosoa, and B. Tamadazte, “Automatic Tip-Steering of Concentric Tube Robots in the Trachea Based on Visual SLAM,” Transactions of Biomedical Engineering and Bionics (T-MRB), Oct. 2020.

Latest Projects

pages.title: Media
pages.content:
2019
  2018
  2017
  2016


2019

  Presentation of our handheld concentric tube robot at the San Diego Robotics Forum


2018

  Fundation Charles Defforey Scientific Prize awarded to Prof. Nicolas Andreff (head of the MiNaRoB Team, AS2M Department, FEMTO-ST Institute)


2017

  IEEE Spectrum 2017: The Most Cringe-Inducing Surgical Robots from IEEE’s Intelligent Robots Conference
  IROS 2017: Toward Optical Biopsy of Olfactory Cells using Concentric Tube Robots with Follow-the-Leader Deployment


2016

  ZEISS Photography competition 2016 at the Department of Engineering, University of Cambridge: 3rd prize award

pages.title: Résumé
pages.description: This is the description of your resume page, as it will be seen by search engines. You’ll probably want to modify it in resume.md, and maybe set hide_description to true in the front matter.

pages.title: Teaching
pages.content:
2017-2018
  2016-2017
  2015-2016


2017-2018

  Control theory (64h, Level: L3 / undergrade), ENSMM, Besançon (France)


2016-2017

  Control theory (27h, Level: L3 / undergrade), ENSMM, Besançon (France)


2015-2016

  Introduction to robotics 2 (18h, Level: L2 / undergrade), INSA Strasbourg, Strasbourg (France)
  Introduction to robotics 3 (new course) (12h, Level: L2 / undergrade), INSA Strasbourg, Strasbourg (France)
  Control theory (36h, Level: L3 / undergrade), INSA Strasbourg, Strasbourg (France)
  Additive manufacturing (15h, Level: M1 / graduate), INSA Strasbourg, Strasbourg (France)
